{{Quote|This is Colonel Meizh Vermel, special emissary from Admiral Pellaeon.|Vermel|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
'''Meizh Vermel''' was a [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], and a trusted subordinate of [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]. In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he was sent to [[Morishim]] by the [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] on a mission to open peace negotiations between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]]. However, his [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] was [[Mission to Morishim|captured]] by the [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] sent by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]] to prevent his mission. He was only able to send a garbled transmission before his capture.

Vermel remained imprisoned at [[Rimcee Station]] until Pellaeon discovered that his ship had been captured by Imperial forces rather than destroyed by the New Republic. Thus, the Imperial commander rescued the colonel.

==Behind the scenes==
Throughout ''[[Specter of the Past]]'', Vermel is referred to as both Colonel and [[Major/Legends|Major]].
